name: monsterbox
description: MonsterBox - Animatronic Control System with ElevenLabs AI, Character Independence, and Dynamic Versioning

scripts.test: npm run test:browser && npm run test:system && npm run test:unit
scripts.test:quick: npm run test:system && npm run test:browser:quick
scripts.test:system:parts: MB_TEST_MODE=1 BASE_URL=http://localhost:3100 mocha tests/system/parts-api.test.js tests/system/hardware.test.js --reporter spec --exit --timeout 10000
scripts.test:system:audio: MB_TEST_MODE=1 BASE_URL=http://localhost:3100 mocha tests/system/audio.test.js tests/system/audio-setup.test.js tests/system/audio-library.test.js tests/system/echo-suppression.test.js --reporter spec --exit --timeout 10000
scripts.test:system:scenes: MB_TEST_MODE=1 BASE_URL=http://localhost:3100 mocha tests/system/scenes.test.js tests/system/animation-studio.test.js --reporter spec --exit --timeout 10000
scripts.test:system:head: MB_TEST_MODE=1 BASE_URL=http://localhost:3100 mocha tests/system/head-animation.test.js --reporter spec --exit --timeout 10000
scripts.test:system:ai: MB_TEST_MODE=1 BASE_URL=http://localhost:3100 mocha tests/system/ai-audio.test.js tests/ai/ask-ai-endpoint.test.js tests/ai/conversation-service.test.js --reporter spec --exit --timeout 10000
scripts.test:browser: MB_TEST_MODE=1 TEST_PORT=3200 BASE_URL=http://localhost:3200 playwright test tests/browser --reporter=list
scripts.test:browser:quick: MB_TEST_MODE=1 TEST_PORT=3200 BASE_URL=http://localhost:3200 playwright test tests/browser/setup-parts.spec.js tests/browser/audio-library.spec.js --reporter=list
scripts.test:browser:setup: MB_TEST_MODE=1 TEST_PORT=3200 BASE_URL=http://localhost:3200 playwright test tests/browser/setup-parts.spec.js --reporter=list
scripts.test:browser:audio: MB_TEST_MODE=1 TEST_PORT=3200 BASE_URL=http://localhost:3200 playwright test tests/browser/audio-library.spec.js --reporter=list
scripts.test:browser:scenes: MB_TEST_MODE=1 TEST_PORT=3200 BASE_URL=http://localhost:3200 playwright test tests/browser/scenes.spec.js --reporter=list
scripts.test:browser:conversation: MB_TEST_MODE=1 TEST_PORT=3200 BASE_URL=http://localhost:3200 playwright test tests/browser/conversation.spec.js --reporter=list
scripts.test:browser:orch: MB_TEST_MODE=1 TEST_PORT=3200 BASE_URL=http://localhost:3200 playwright test tests/browser/orchestration.spec.js --reporter=list
scripts.test:browser:calibration: MB_TEST_MODE=1 TEST_PORT=3200 BASE_URL=http://localhost:3200 playwright test tests/browser/calibration-panels.spec.js tests/browser/webcam-calibration.spec.js --reporter=list
scripts.test:browser:jaw: MB_TEST_MODE=1 TEST_PORT=3200 BASE_URL=http://localhost:3200 playwright test tests/browser/jaw-animation.spec.js --reporter=list
scripts.test:browser:head: MB_TEST_MODE=1 TEST_PORT=3200 BASE_URL=http://localhost:3200 playwright test tests/browser/head-tracking-dashboard.spec.js tests/browser/head-tracking-presets.spec.js --reporter=list
scripts.test:browser:ai: MB_TEST_MODE=1 TEST_PORT=3200 BASE_URL=http://localhost:3200 playwright test tests/browser/ai-settings.spec.js tests/browser/conversation.spec.js tests/browser/conversation-refactor.spec.js --reporter=list
scripts.test:browser:models: MB_TEST_MODE=1 TEST_PORT=3200 BASE_URL=http://localhost:3200 playwright test tests/browser/models.spec.js --reporter=list
scripts.test:browser:video: MB_TEST_MODE=1 TEST_PORT=3200 BASE_URL=http://localhost:3200 playwright test tests/browser/video-library.spec.js --reporter=list
scripts.test:browser:webcam: MB_TEST_MODE=1 TEST_PORT=3200 BASE_URL=http://localhost:3200 playwright test tests/browser/webcam-capture.spec.js tests/browser/webcam-calibration.spec.js --reporter=list
scripts.test:browser:dashboard: MB_TEST_MODE=1 TEST_PORT=3200 BASE_URL=http://localhost:3200 playwright test tests/browser/panel-sortable.spec.js tests/browser/relay-toggle.spec.js --reporter=list
scripts.test:browser:headed: MB_TEST_MODE=1 TEST_PORT=3200 BASE_URL=http://localhost:3200 playwright test tests/browser --headed --reporter=list
scripts.test:mcp: MB_TEST_MODE=1 TEST_PORT=3200 BASE_URL=http://localhost:3200 playwright test tests/browser --config=playwright.mcp.config.js --reporter=list
scripts.test:mcp:quick: MB_TEST_MODE=1 TEST_PORT=3200 BASE_URL=http://localhost:3200 playwright test tests/browser/setup-parts.spec.js tests/browser/audio-library.spec.js --config=playwright.mcp.config.js --reporter=list
scripts.verify: npm run test:system && npm run test:unit && npm run test:browser
scripts.verify:mcp: npm run test:system && npm run test:unit && npm run test:mcp

author: MonsterBox Team
